Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-EIC Major Revision in high-duration variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Assign a Different Editor' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
